articles.title: House passes DHS funding bill that would end shutdown for most of agency - The Washington Post
articles.description: Earlier this week, House Republican leaders were insisting that the Senate-passed bill had a technical problem that made it impossible for them to support it.
articles.content: The U.S. House ended the bulk of the longest government shutdown in U.S. history Thursday, approving a bipartisan bill to fund most of the Department of Homeland Security after weeks of delay and wit… [+16 chars]

articles.title: Hackers are actively exploiting a bug in cPanel, used by millions of websites - TechCrunch
articles.description: Web hosts are scrambling to fix the bug under active attack by hackers. One company said hackers have been abusing the bug for months.
articles.content:
Security researchers are sounding the alarm on a newly discovered vulnerability in the widely used web server management software cPanel and WebHost Manager (WHM).
